name: Wreck The Robot
author: Poki
description: Wreck The Robot is a physics game where your only mission is simple—destroy the robots! Smash them into walls, slam them around, and rack up coins based on the damage you cause. Use your earnings to unlock even more powerful weapons and explosive booms to create total robotic mayhem. The more destruction, the more rewards! Ready to wreck some metal? How to play Wreck The Robot? Click or tap to make the choice. Click and hold to lift the robot. Who created Wreck The Robot? Wreck The Robot is created by Boop Games. Play their other games on Poki: Planet Destruction ! How can I play Wreck The Robot for free? You can play Wreck The Robot for free on Poki. Can I play Wreck The Robot on mobile devices and desktop? Wreck The Robot can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
